strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary languages like Java.
Directly applicable experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators from his current role at re:cinq.
Exceptional background in software testing, including applying TDD, building custom testing libraries, and teaching test automation.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are listed as primary stack technologies.
Has a history of relatively short tenures (1-2 years) in several past roles, which could present a retention risk.
A significant portion of past backend and performance-critical work was done in DLang, which is outside the required tech stack.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate who exceeds the 6+ years of required experience and aligns closely with the core technical competencies. His resume demonstrates concrete expertise in the primary stack, notably using TypeScript, Node.js, and React at Optilyz, alongside highly relevant recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. He also meets the secondary requirement of Java from his time at Altom Consulting. Although his resume lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, his profound background in test-driven development and cloud architecture (e.g., AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) strongly suggests he can quickly adapt. Because he provides concrete evidence for almost every core and secondary requirement, he earns a very high score.
